description: Create a two-column content slide on risk and regulation with donut charts comparing cross-sector average vs financial services on data-centric decision making, plus a left-side compliance callout and four right-side text sections.

steps.label: Financial services is more likely than other sectors to take a data-centric approach to responding to market risks with agility
steps.sub: Data-centric decision making: 45% cross-sector average; 50% financial services. Question: Which of the following tactics do you use to adapt your digital transformation strategy in response to evolving market trends and risks?
